topic: identifying points on the coordinate plane
latex: In the coordinate plane below, which point could have coordinates $(-4, 3)$?
diagram_notes: A coordinate plane with x and y axes, origin labeled O. Four points are plotted: Point A is in quadrant I (positive x, positive y), Point B is in quadrant II (negative x, positive y), Point C is in quadrant IV (positive x, negative y), and Point D is in quadrant III (negative x, negative y). The axes have arrows indicating positive directions.
